phases.title: Bootstrap GGD
tasks: capture current route blockers in human and machine state

phases.title: Port deterministic law into contracts
tasks: formalize spacing, grid, typography, color, breakpoint, semantic, and code-quality conventions
define acceptance tests for home, flagship, and product-family routes
record forbidden moves and route-role invariants

phases.title: Port verification bundles
tasks: map current audits into those bundles
ensure every failure produces a gap record

phases.title: Port command and agent surfaces
tasks: align geometry skill and claw prompts to GGD artifacts
map claw lanes to GGD agent families
exit_gates: agent families are named and scoped

phases.title: Migrate active route work
tasks: record homepage and IMC closure evidence in GGD
record XR and FT failures as explicit route gaps
prevent route work outside the GGD contract
exit_gates: current route truth lives in GGD state
XR and FT gap records exist

phases.title: Resume autonomy under GGD
tasks: bind CLAW execution against GGD contract artifacts
prove rejectable recursive improvement under the GGD rules
exit_gates: supervised cycle passes under GGD contract
route failures become explicit GGD gaps
